name: Lou Donaldson
abstract: Louis Andrew Donaldson Jr. (November 1, 1926 – November 9, 2024) was an American jazz alto saxophonist.

interviews.title: Lou Donaldson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

concerts.label: Kool-Newport Jazz Festival: Tribute to Charlie Parker
JVC Jazz Festival: Patti LaBelle, Singer, and Lou Donaldson Quartet
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Giacomo Gates
about_quotes.evidence: I did get to meet some people who I was knocked out to meet like Max Roach and Lou Donaldson and Mose Allison and I got to work with Walter Bishop Junior and Lou
about_quotes.doc_title: Giacomo Gates interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, November 11, 2017 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Wormworth
about_quotes.evidence: He was kind of a spiritual and artistic father to me... he championed me and taught me a lot.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Wormworth interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 6, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Curtis Fuller
about_quotes.evidence: I did a recording with Lee Morgan and Lou Donaldson. It was called “Sputnik”
about_quotes.doc_title: Curtis Fuller — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: Lou Donaldson was another one I worked with just briefly before Dizzy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Watson
about_quotes.evidence: People like Lou Donaldson and Barry Harris, they’re in our generation, a lot of them just started going to Europe maybe ten years ago for the first time in their life.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Watson interviewed by Michael Woods, Clinton, New York, January 19, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Glenn Zottola
about_quotes.evidence: I remember hiring Lou Donaldson years ago for a series at a five star hotel... Twenty years later I’m doing the Clearwater Jazz Festival... he comes up to me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Glenn Zottola interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 7, 2020
